title: Senior Doctor - Narayana Health South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Narayana Health South Asia Partners - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Narayana Health South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Narayana Health South Asia Partners:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health South Asia Partners!
